audit_result.proof_trace: Logic inverted: function returns early when blobsCount > 0 (line 58), preventing RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE error. When a block has blobs but node is missing custody columns, it yields partial sidecars instead of throwing error, violating all-or-nothing requirement.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker requests data columns by range. Node missing some custody columns for a blob-containing block returns partial response instead of RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE, violating consistency and breaking data availability assumptions.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-043.text: All sidecars of a block must be included in by_range response if any sidecar is included.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-043.assertion: forall block, resp: any_sidecar_included(block, resp) => all_sidecars_included(block, resp)
